Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}I bet midterms will be easy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}But I'm gonna study just to be on the safe side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}If you can't concentrate at home, try going to the school library.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}It's right across from the faculty office, and it's open most of the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Well, I guess it went okay...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Let's wait for the scores to be posted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Just like I thought—my score wasn't too bad. I guess it's a good starting point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}It's almost time for exams again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}But this time, it'll be a lot tougher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}You better go to the library and study. Otherwise, you'll be screwed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Hmm, I guess I did okay again... But I better do some studying over summer vacation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Second semester is gonna be rough.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}I'm nervous already...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}It was easier than I expected, but I still missed some.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}So I guess I could've done better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Phew, what a relief... I didn't do too badly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}But my scores will never go up if I don't take things more seriously...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}I'm gonna study as soon as I get home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Your exam scores can affect your career opportunities, you know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Oh, man... Now I feel sick to my stomach...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Hmmm, how should I describe this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}I feel like I'm climbing a mountain without a rope...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Oh man, my stomach hurts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Did you see the scores? Man, I blew it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}I wasn't the last on the list, but... it's definitely gonna affect my future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 311}Ugh... Everything is getting dark...[n]{f 1 1}
